Class ObjectOps

java.lang.Object
com.yelstream.topp.standard.operation.type.ObjectOps
public class ObjectOps extends Object
Utilities addressing instances of Object.
Since:
2026-04-21
Version:
1.0
Author:
Morten Sabroe Mortensen

  • Constructor Details

    • ObjectOps

      public ObjectOps()

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public static Optional<String> getName(Object value)
      Returns the runtime class name of the given value.

      If the provided value is null, an empty Optional is returned. Otherwise, the fully qualified class name of the value's runtime type is returned.

      This method is a null-safe convenience wrapper around Object.getClass() and Class.getName().

      Parameters:
      value - The value whose class name should be returned; may be null.
      Returns:
      Container of the fully qualified class name, or empty if the value is null.

    • tryCastOptional

      public static <T> Optional<T> tryCastOptional(Object value, Class<T> type)
      Attempts to cast a value to a specific type.

      If the value is non-null and is an instance of the target type, it is returned wrapped in an Optional. Otherwise, an empty Optional is returned.

      This method is the core casting primitive; all other cast methods delegate to it.

      Type Parameters:
      T - Type of target value.
      Parameters:
      value - Value to cast. This may be null
      type - Target class to cast to This must not be null.
      Returns:
      Container of the cast value if successful, otherwise empty.

    • tryCast

      public static <T> T tryCast(Object value, Class<T> type)
      Attempts to cast a value to a specific type.

      If the value is not an instance of the target type or is null, this method returns null.

      This is a convenience wrapper around tryCastOptional(Object, Class) for null-based APIs.

      Type Parameters:
      T - Type of target value.
      Parameters:
      value - Value to cast. This may be null
      type - Target class to cast to This must not be null.
      Returns:
      Cast value, or null if the cast is not possible.

    • cast

      public static <T> T cast(Object value, Class<T> type)
      Casts a value to a specific type.

      If the value is null or not an instance of the target type, a ClassCastException is thrown.

      This method provides a strict casting contract and delegates to tryCastOptional(Object, Class) for evaluation.

      Type Parameters:
      T - Type of target value.
      Parameters:
      value - Value to cast. This may be null
      type - Target class to cast to This must not be null.
      Returns:
      Cast value.
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - Thrown in case the value is null or not of the specified type.
